# inputImage()

**Instance Method**

Returns the  input  image associated with the picture taker.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func inputImage() -> NSImage!
```

## Return Value

The input image.

## Discussion

The input image is never modified by the picture taker.

## Getting and Setting Images

- **setInputImage(_:)**: Set the image input for the picture taker.
- **outputImage()**: Returns the edited image.
